description: Add E2E tests for theme toggle (light/dark mode) in the side panel: switching modes, CSS variable application, PluginIcon dark variant selection, and theme persistence across side panel close/reopen.

userStories.title: E2E test: theme toggle switches between light and dark mode
userStories.description: Test that clicking the theme toggle button in the footer switches between light and dark mode, verified by the html element's class and the icon change (Moon â†’ Sun).
acceptanceCriteria: Side panel starts in light mode (no 'dark' class on html)
Footer shows Moon icon button with aria-label 'Switch to dark mode'
Clicking the toggle adds 'dark' class to html element
Footer shows Sun icon button with aria-label 'Switch to light mode'
Clicking again removes 'dark' class and shows Moon icon

userStories.title: E2E test: theme persists across side panel close and reopen
userStories.description: Test that selecting dark mode, closing the side panel, and reopening it preserves the dark theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Switch to dark mode, close side panel
Reopen side panel â€” html element has 'dark' class
Footer shows Sun icon (dark mode active)
Switch back to light mode, close and reopen â€” html does NOT have 'dark' class
